action.reasoning: Observation: Training completed 40 epochs reaching best mIoU=0.4432. Previous eval showed 0.2832 after 3 epochs. Now at epoch 40 with 0.4432. Analysis: With only 1.96h remaining, I cannot afford another long training run (~9 min/epoch). I should submit eval with the current best checkpoint to get an updated score. The model has been improving steadily. Decision: Submit eval with best checkpoint immediately.
